industry: Foreign trade / import-export for windows, doors, and hardware accessories
core_need: AI-assisted workflow to improve order handling, supplier communication, and quote preparation
current_workflow_summary: Customer sends order by email/SMS; staff manually review and enter data; staff create supplier order; supplier confirms cost/specifications/delivery; staff manually enter confirmation; staff add profit and send customer quotation
automation_scope: Email monitoring; AI extraction of product model, quantity and specifications; human review checkpoints; supplier matching; supplier inquiry/order email drafts; supplier confirmation reading; cost/specification/delivery comparison; quote draft generation with human final approval
profit_rules: Margins vary by customer. Most B2B orders are around 10%; some interstate B2B customers such as Melbourne may be around 30%. System should suggest margin by customer type, region and rules, with human approval.
phase_1_positioning: Lean AI Order Workflow MVP. Email-first intake, AI field extraction, human approval, supplier draft generation, confirmation reading, comparison, and rule-based quote draft. Avoid promising OrderTron replacement, deep two-way integration, fully automated SMS, fully automatic pricing decisions, unlimited template adaptation, or long-term support unless separately agreed.
follow_up: Client has received an initial commercial proposal and will discuss with partners. Follow up on partner concerns, decision timing and demo-first MVP appetite.
next_questions: Mailbox provider? Order formats: email body/PDF/Excel/Word/images? Can OrderTron export CSV/Excel? Where are margin rules recorded? How many supplier formats for Phase 1? What would count as a successful partner demo?
